summary: Completed testing of FMCG/Retail Management System. Backend APIs are fully functional, but frontend has intermittent loading issues preventing consistent content rendering.

minor_issues.issue: Health check endpoint returns 404 (not critical as main endpoints work)

critical_bugs.issue: Intermittent loading failures - app gets stuck in loading state with only logo visible
critical_bugs.symptoms: Users may see loading screen indefinitely instead of content

ui_bugs.issue: React Native shadow* style props deprecated warnings

integration_issues.issue: Inconsistent content rendering - sometimes works, sometimes fails to load
integration_issues.symptoms: App may display loading screen instead of landing page content

server_issues.issue: HTTP 520 server errors during resource loading
Unauthorized request from domain - CORS/middleware issue

passed_tests: Backend API - Login with test credentials (test@example.com)
Frontend - Initial load and content display (when working)
Frontend - All product cards visible (Retail Pro, Inventory, Invoicing, etc.)
Frontend - Login form elements present and functional

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All API endpoints tested are working correctly
success_percentage.frontend: 70% - Core functionality works but has reliability issues

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix frontend loading reliability - app sometimes gets stuck in loading state instead of showing content
Investigate HTTP 520 server errors affecting resource loading
Resolve CORS/middleware authorization issues causing 'Unauthorized request' errors
Update deprecated React Native shadow* style props to boxShadow
Add /api/health endpoint for proper health monitoring
Test frontend loading consistency across different network conditions
